events.name: Comfort Music + Homeroom: Caroline Jesalva / Katinka Kleijn, Aquarius Ester / Avin HannahSmith
events.description: Comfort Music + is a weekly performance series curated by Homeroom every Monday in June at Comfort Station . Comfort Music + presents music acts combined with other performance media, including video, dance, spoken word, and installation art. This unlikely curatorial presentation allows artistic communities to commingle in the hopes of future collaboration and connection. This year's series is curated by musician/interdisciplinary artist Scott Rubin , featuring collaborations between musicians, visual artists, performing artists, and technologists. This program is partially supported by a gran

Loaner books will be available, and there will be a break for socializing. events.description: Zander Raymond is an interdisciplinary artist and musician living and working in Chicago, IL. events.description: In a series of short works, Conveyor explores the movement of communication and how it shapes our inner and outer worlds. When information flows in droves through voice, body, and tech, what happens in the gap between what is sent and what is received? Through moments of clarity, connection, chaos, or contradiction, each piece offers its own perspective on the unspoken and amplified exchanges that unfold between us every day.
